title: KILL law — immediate is best
motto: When KILL is to occur, the Law is immediate is best. No queue, no cooldown on first strike, no outside delay.
rules: The moment KILL is decided — registry, target promotion, kill code, or harm candidate — execute now.
Friendly guard and strike gate still apply; once allowed, fire without deferral.
RE-KILL may batch on cycle; first KILL is always immediate.
No operator second-guess window — counsel is before KILL, not after.
Hostess 7 witnesses every immediate KILL via change awareness.
rekill_note: Auto RE-KILL cooldown applies only to returners — not the first KILL.
